{{Infobox character
| name = Jak Escalon
| aliases = Jak
| parents = {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aila Escalon|Aila]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|President of the Escalon Company, president of the Escalon Company}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Escalon Company]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|arms dealer}}{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|, president of a galactic corporation}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Engineer (novel)|The Engineer]]
}}

''See also: [[Jak Escalon Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Jak Escalon, also known as Jak, is the current president of the [[Escalon Company]], a mid-level interplanetary corporation. Despite inheriting the business, he is described as being ill-suited for leadership and power, often appearing anxious, nervous, and physically strained. He is characterized as a thin man with graying hair who frequently displays panic or exhaustion. While some view him as a decent individual, he is also identified as an arms dealer. His legal standing is precarious, as he has faced arrest warrants from the Advocates on charges involving smuggling and the illegal manufacturing of weapons. Jak is the nephew of [[Omega]], who serves as a hired killer and poses as his uncle to hide his immortality. Under Jak's authority as acting president, he has the power to release [[Omega]]'s bonds and authorize lethal force. Jak is part of a family that includes [[Omal]] Escalon, the company's founder, and [[Aila Escalon]]. He maintains a relationship with his mother and has been involved in tense negotiations and high-pressure situations involving various galactic entities.}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Jak is a descendant of [[Omega]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Jak is the acting president of the [[Escalon Company]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Jak is the nephew of the narrator and an arms dealer.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c40">''The Captain'', chapter 40</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|As the President of the [[Escalon Company]], Jak Escalon is publicly recognized as the nephew of [[Omega]], though he is actually [[Omega]]'s grandson. Following a communication between the two men, Jak was later accused of smuggling and the illegal manufacturing of weapons. During his interactions with [[Nafir Nuren]], Jak remained uncooperative. Ultimately, [[Omega]] scooped up the man, who is noted as being the grandson of a figure characterized by insane laughter.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Jak is the grandson of [[Omega]] and the President of the [[Escalon Company]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c22">''The Engineer'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Jak is publicly known as [[Omega]]'s nephew.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Omega]] had a call with Jak.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Jak is mentioned as a potential combatant or family member of [[Omega]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41">''The Engineer'', chapter 41</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Jak Escalon]] is accused of illegal weapon manufacturing and smuggling.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c43">''The Engineer'', chapter 43</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Jak is the grandson of a man with insane laughter.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c43" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Jak was not cooperative with [[Nafir Nuren]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c43" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Omega]] scooped up Jak.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c45">''The Engineer'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Jak is the president of a galactic corporation and Aila's son.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1">''The Pilot'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Jak is almost fifty years old.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Jak is described as a thin, weaselly man with gray at his temples and a nervous look tattooed on his face.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c42">''The Pilot'', chapter 42</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Jak was previously captured by the Advocates.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c42" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|"I thought you might have turned us over to them, and Jak was not�cooperative."<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c43" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“I’m the president of a galactic corporation, Mom, I’m not going to quit.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
